subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O God! O my God and my Beloved! I ask Thee, by Thy Name by which Thy mercy anticipated all things
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و محبوبی اسئلک باسمک الذی سبقت رحمتک کل الاشیاء و اشرقت شمس جمال
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @prayer for healing, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
